docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,050.00 FILED BY WONG ARLAN AS TO DEFENDANT KOZLOWSKI KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOZLOWSKI KAREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG ARLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOZLOWSKI KAREN $995.00 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,033.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $750.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $13.98 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT KOZLOWSKI KAREN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KOZLOWSKI KAREN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $346.74 AS TO DEFENDANT KOZLOWSKI KAREN
